name: Immortal Astral Continent Arrival
description: Wang Lin arrives at the Immortal Astral Continent, the apex realm of the Ergenverse.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Immortal Astral Continent Arrival. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
